2026-04-14T11:21:31.1671681Z ---
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1672181Z description: |
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1672864Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1673886Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1715037Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1716737Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1717706Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1718204Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1718356Z on:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1718701Z   issues:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1719052Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1719441Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1720094Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1720446Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1721084Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1721818Z         required: true
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1722205Z         type: string
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1722585Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1722943Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1723159Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1723327Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1723575Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1723747Z network:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1724083Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1724430Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1724807Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1725043Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1725200Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1725606Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1726057Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1726403Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1726742Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1727102Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1727459Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1727788Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1728151Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1728499Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1728824Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1729185Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1729546Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1735262Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1735685Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1736050Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1736400Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1736756Z   noop:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1737140Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1737571Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1737903Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1738842Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1740232Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1740795Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1741292Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1741657Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1742040Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1742386Z         message:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1742946Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1743607Z           required: true
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1744029Z           type: string
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1744407Z         owners:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1745241Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1746386Z           required: true
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1746802Z           type: string
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1747186Z       steps:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1747715Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1748205Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1748669Z           env:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1749218Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1750051Z           with:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1750414Z             script: |
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1750821Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1751373Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1751789Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1751981Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1752683Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1753395Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1753884Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1754410Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1755101Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1755642Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1756068Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1756430Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1756837Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1757042Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1757256Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1757808Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1758334Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1758657Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1758834Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1790709Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1792186Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1792583Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1792809Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1793010Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1793591Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1794132Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1794573Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1795140Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1795691Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1796181Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1796628Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1797200Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1798506Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1799393Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1817154Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1817895Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1818557Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1819116Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1819585Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1820016Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1820188Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1820704Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1821261Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1821650Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1822035Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1822659Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1823260Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1823630Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1823826Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1824005Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1824626Z               try {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1825160Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1825902Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1826555Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1827224Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1827610Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1827816Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1828081Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1828760Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1829310Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1850077Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1850366Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1850785Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1851504Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1852126Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1852725Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1853115Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1853330Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1853509Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1854182Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1854980Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1855586Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1855972Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1856190Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1856376Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1856869Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1857319Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1857773Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1858210Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1858707Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1859307Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1860698Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1861362Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1861845Z                   })
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1862239Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1862543Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1862732Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1863346Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1863967Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1864382Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1864592Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1864769Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1865321Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1865885Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1866205Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1866364Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1866818Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1867402Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1867919Z                     body
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1868315Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1868978Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1869930Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1870609Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1871304Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1871707Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1872059Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1874387Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1874537Z tools:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1874887Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1875233Z   github:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1875582Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1876335Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1877049Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1877838Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1878408Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1878659Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1878831Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1879207Z ---

2026-04-14T11:21:31.1900796Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1901186Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1902094Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"

2026-04-14T11:21:31.1903567Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1904048Z       permissions:

2026-04-14T11:21:31.1907932Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1908853Z           required: true
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1909243Z           type: string
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1909930Z       steps:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1910320Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1910947Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9

2026-04-14T11:21:31.1911959Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1912622Z           with:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1912986Z             script: |
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1913381Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1913939Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1914340Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1914543Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1915232Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1915955Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1916422Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1916952Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1917653Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1918203Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1918632Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1919001Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1919408Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1919612Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1919994Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1920558Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1921096Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1921422Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1921608Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1922947Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1924270Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1924656Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1924857Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1925043Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1925619Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1926147Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1926584Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1927159Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1927703Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1928198Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1928639Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1929199Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1930522Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1931418Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1931822Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1932444Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1933053Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1933429Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1933883Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1934088Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1934256Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1934775Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1935306Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1935685Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1936086Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1936714Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1937326Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1937706Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1937907Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1938080Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1938504Z               try {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1939171Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1939975Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1940722Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1941380Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1941759Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1941961Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1942235Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1942892Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1943439Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1943811Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1944028Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1944390Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1945083Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1945666Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1946265Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1946651Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1946857Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1947033Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1947721Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1948515Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1949209Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1949629Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1949972Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1950164Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1950661Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1951117Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1951568Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1952020Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1952499Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1953094Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1953778Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1954437Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1954904Z                   })
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1955288Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1955577Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1955758Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1956373Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1956972Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1957366Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1957574Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1957757Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1958294Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1958854Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1959157Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1959316Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1959979Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1960568Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1961087Z                     body
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1961475Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1962142Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1962909Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1963564Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1964243Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1964628Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1964987Z               }
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1965192Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1965341Z tools:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1965682Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1966033Z   github:
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1966368Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1966881Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1967690Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1968390Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1969069Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1969320Z 
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1969483Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1970206Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T11:21:31.1970883Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T11:21:31.2003807Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
